meta.notes: Ontario RPP Tiered: a lower rate up to a monthly threshold, higher above it (Tier 1 ~0.103, Tier 2 ~0.125; threshold ~600 kWh winter / 1000 kWh summer). Block tiers are a v1.1 schema feature — modelled here as the Tier-1 flat rate. Rates APPROXIMATE (~2026) — verify with the OEB. Province-wide. Delivery/fixed charges excluded.
